title: Police clearance certificates: What you need to know
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KWANONQABA NEWS -  On a Monday morning, more than 20 individuals visit the KwaNonqaba Police Station for the purpose of obtaining a police clearance certificate.","html":"KWANONQABA NEWS - On a Monday morning, more than 20 individuals visit the KwaNonqaba Police Station for the purpose of obtaining a police clearance certificate."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"These people, South African citizens as well as foreign nationals, are often job seekers. Other times they are sent by an employer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A police clearance certificate confirms whether an individual has a criminal record or not, and is also available to those who require confirmation of their criminal status for emigration purposes, travel or employment abroad.","html":"A police clearance certificate confirms whether an individual has a criminal record or not, and is also available to those who require confirmation of their criminal status for emigration purposes, travel or employment abroad."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the KwaNonqaba Police Station's spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, the applicants for a police clearance certificate often arrive at the station without the necessary documents, making an already lengthy process even lengthier.","html":"According to the KwaNonqaba Police Station's spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, the applicants for a police clearance certificate often arrive at the station without the necessary documents, making an already lengthy process even lengthier."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"If an individual has the right documents, it can go much quicker,\" he says.","html":"\"If an individual has the right documents, it can go much quicker,\" he says."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Members of the public who require a police clearance certificate need to bring their original ID or passport, as well as R85 in cash."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Asylum seekers need to obtain a verification certificate from the Department of Home Affairs first before heading to the KwaNonqaba Police Station.","html":"Asylum seekers need to obtain a verification certificate from the Department of Home Affairs first before heading to the KwaNonqaba Police Station."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Applicants will receive their police clearance certificate after two weeks.","html":"Applicants will receive their police clearance certificate after two weeks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kapp emphasised that though the station deals with a heavy workload overall, its officials are more than willing to assist the community where they can.","html":"Kapp emphasised that though the station deals with a heavy workload overall, its officials are more than willing to assist the community where they can."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On one such Monday morning, the station received 140 applicants. In that instance, other members of the KwaNonqaba Police jumped in to assist.","html":"On one such Monday morning, the station received 140 applicants. In that instance, other members of the KwaNonqaba Police jumped in to assist."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"If we don't do our jobs correctly, it can delay employment for these people. Every individual deserves that proper attention, because it is their livelihoods that are impacted,\" says Kapp."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Applications for a police clearance certificate may be completed at the KwaNonqaba Police Station on any day of the week.","html":"Applications for a police clearance certificate may be completed at the KwaNonqaba Police Station on any day of the week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Police clearance certificates: What you need to know
